title: /rem
text: /rem Remove a Uniface Router installed as a service on Microsoft Windows. /rem { =" ServiceName " } Parameters ServiceName —name of a Uniface Router service previously installed using the /inst switch. If you do not specify the ServiceName parameter, the default name Uniface10 URouter is used. Use With urouter —Uniface Router on Microsoft Windows. For more information, see urouter . Description You can use the /rem switch only on the Windows command line for the Uniface Router ( urouter.exe ). Related Links /inst Install and register the Uniface Router as a Windows service under a unique service name. Install a Uniface Router on Windows On Microsoft Windows, the Uniface Router is automatically installed as a service. You can install additional Uniface Routers as separate services.
